title: EB has update, CC on the latest -  Update button, Release notes and Poly Lens links are available
scenario: Update button on device home screen navigates to Software Update tab with badge and release notes when earbuds firmware update is available and charge case is up to date
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure the charge case is on the latest firmware version.
3. Ensure the earbuds have a firmware update available.
4. Observe the Home screen — an Update button should be displayed for the earbuds.
6. Observe navigation to Device Settings → Software Update tab.
7. Verify the Software Update tab shows an Update button for the earbuds.
8. Verify a "1" badge is displayed on the Software Update settings tab.
9. Verify a Release notes link is displayed for the earbuds.
10. Verify a Poly Lens App link is displayed for the charge case.
11. Verify informational text indicating that Poly Lens Desktop is required for the charge case update.
expected: The Update button appears on the Home screen. Tapping it navigates to Device Settings > Software Update tab. The earbuds Update button is shown with a "1" badge on the settings tab. Release notes link for earbuds and Poly Lens App link for the charge case are displayed, along with info about needing Lens Desktop for the charge case.
